text: All five files were confirmed to exist at `security/nss/lib/ssl/` in the mozilla-firefox/firefox repository, both locally and via Sourcegraph. 1) `ssl3con.c` — implements SSL 3.0/TLS record processing, cipher suite negotiation, and the core handshake state machine (header: 'SSL3 Protocol'). 2) `tls13con.c` — implements TLS 1.3 handshake and record processing including key schedule, 0-RTT, and post-handshake messages (header: 'TLS 1.3 Protocol'). 3) `dtlscon.c` — implements DTLS-specific protocol handling including retransmit timers, MTU management, and datagram fragmentation (header: 'DTLS Protocol'). 4) `ssl3ecc.c` — implements ECC cipher suite operations (ECDHE key exchange, EC key pair generation), originally split out from ssl3con.c (comment: 'ECC code moved here from ssl3con.c'). 5) `sslexp.h` — header declaring experimental SSL APIs via the `SSL_EXPERIMENTAL_API` macro, with explicit warning that functions may not remain available in future NSS versions.
